svg.text: Step-by-step process for requesting barangay documents at the kiosk
No login required — walk in, tap, and submit your request
📱 Available at the barangay hall kiosk tablet

text.tspan: • Go to the kiosk tablet at the
• The kiosk shows the Welcome screen
• You'll see the Next Step screen
• Type your name (e.g., Juan Dela Cruz)
• Works even offline using cached data
• Select your name from the list
• Select the document type you need
• Enter the purpose of your request
• If desk is active: called by
• Or wait at the hall if present
• The entire kiosk app loads from cache
• Barangay list loaded from local storage
• Resident search works with cached data
• Auto-syncs to server when back online
• Connect to WiFi on first launch
• Let the app fully load once
• All data is downloaded and cached
If you already have a barangay
is your proof of request. If a

svg.text: Document availability and pricing are configured by your barangay administrator. Fees are shown before you submit.
Smart Barangay Kiosk — Walk-In Request Guide
Available at the barangay hall kiosk tablet — no account needed
For questions, ask the barangay secretary or visit the admin desk
